title: Steamed Japanese Paella
description: A unique twist on traditional Japanese cuisine, combining the flavors of steamed paella with Japanese ingredients.
instructions: In a large steamer basket, place the paella.
In a medium saucepan, combine 2 cups of water and 1 tsp of Dutch mustard.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Add the steamed vegetables to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Pour the nitrogenated sake over the paella in the steamer basket.
Steam the paella for 10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the steamed paella with the vegetable mixture spooned over the top.
